# Email Agent Skill

Email Agent Skill is a skill package for agentic email planning, tool handoffs, safe execution, and review loops.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add emailagentskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://emailagentskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://emailagentskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://emailagentskill.com/skills/emailagentskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://emailagentskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Email Agent Strategy: https://emailagentskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Email Agent Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://emailagentskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Email Agent Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://emailagentskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
